markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to deliver 10 new articles and 5 content refreshes weekly, with first batch of 11 articles (including 3 initial pieces) by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Galileo to provide examples of preferred tone/style and clarify positioning on "observability" vs "monitoring"](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Focus on full-stack engineers as primary audience, explaining concepts without assuming complete context](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Content strategy targets keywords aligned with Galileo's strengths in AI model evaluation, monitoring, and observability](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Topics

### Content Tone and Target Audience

  - [No formal tone guide yet; aiming for authoritative but readable content](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Not humorous/playful; more educational and expert-oriented](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Target audience: Full-stack engineers learning AI, as well as ML engineers](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Explain concepts assuming intelligence but not complete context](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Link to deeper dives for complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Keyword Strategy and Content Planning

  - [11 keywords selected, focusing on Galileo's strengths (e.g., LLM evaluation, AI model validation)](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Emphasis on practical solutions for AI engineers and leaders](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Some overlap with existing content (e.g., LLM monitoring, observability)](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Plan to update or redirect traffic for overlapping topics based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### Content Refresh and Performance Tracking

  - [5 content refreshes planned weekly](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Using Google Search Console to track performance and identify articles for refresh](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Example shown: 30% overall site lift after refreshing 5 articles for another client](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

### New Content Opportunities

  - [Suggestion to create breakdowns of new AI model releases](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Potential for short-form video content with Galileo's viewpoint](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### SEO and Analytics

  - [Using SEMrush for keyword research and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide regular reports on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

### Content Publishing and CRO Tactics

  - [GrowthX to share best practices for publishing approach](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [CRO tactics shared, with examples from other clients like Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Galileo to send examples of preferred tone/style (e.g., CEO blog posts, tweets)](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Galileo to provide input on "observability" vs "monitoring" positioning](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Conor to pull data on current keyword rankings for existing content](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver 11 articles (including 3 initial pieces) by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Galileo to review and provide feedback on first 2-4 weeks of content for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Airtable as content OS, with updates via Slack and Notion](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [GrowthX to share best practices for content publishing approach](https://fathom.video/share/8eWCD5tHzyB8Ep5ms9t6VcqDQv_aD_du?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
